files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+created: 2025-12-05
+title: Tenzir Security Lake Tools v1.0.0
+intro: >-
+  This release drops support for Python 3.10 and 3.11, requiring Python 3.12 or later.

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+This release drops support for Python 3.10 and 3.11, requiring Python 3.12 or later.
+
+## 🔧 Changes
+
+### Remove Python 3.10 and 3.11 support
+
+The minimum Python version is now 3.12. The CI test matrix now covers Python 3.12 and 3.13.
+
+*By @mavam and @claude.*

@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ build-backend = "hatchling.build"
 
 [project]
 name = "security-lake-tools"
-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "1.0.0"
 description = "Tools for managing AWS Security Lake custom sources"
 readme = "README.md"
 requires-python = ">=3.12"
@@ -97,4 +97,4 @@ exclude_lines = [
     "raise AssertionError",
     "raise NotImplementedError",
     "if __name__ == .__main__.:",
-]
\ No newline at end of file
+]

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 version = 1
 revision = 3
-requires-python = ">=3.10"
+requires-python = ">=3.12"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "black"
@@ -12,19 +12,9 @@ dependencies = [
     { name = "packaging" },
     { name = "pathspec" },
     { name = "platformdirs" },
